name: Forever Consumed
desc_clean: Umbra X Of a collective mind, the massive Umbra Shroud can wreak devastating damage upon the unfortunate soul who has been targeted by its wrath.
mechanic_summary: Forever Consumed to Spell klanu Umbra. Umbra X Of a collective mind, the massive Umbra Shroud can wreak devastating damage upon the unfortunate soul who has been targeted by its wrath. Keywords: brak.
wiki_desc: Umbra X Of a collective mind, the massive Umbra Shroud can wreak devastating damage upon the unfortunate soul who has been targeted by its wrath. On the one occasion I was witness to such an event, I was unable to return to the Crucible for months, afraid of the slightest chance it could happen to me.
